name: formatSpreadsheetCells
description: Formats cells in a Google Spreadsheet range. Supports background color, text color, font size, bold, italic, and alignment.

spreadsheetId.description: The ID of the Google Spreadsheet (from the URL).

range.description: A1 notation range to format (e.g., "A1:B10" or "Sheet1!A1:B10").

backgroundColor.description: Background color in hex format (e.g., "#FF0000" for red, "#FFFF00" for yellow).

textColor.description: Text/foreground color in hex format (e.g., "#0000FF" for blue).
